# Ringo's Taxis

> Reliable 24/7 taxi service in Ringwood, Hampshire and across South UK. Wheelchair accessible vehicles (WAV) and fixed-price airport transfers.

## About

Ringo's Taxis is a local taxi and private hire service based in Ringwood, Hampshire. We serve Ringwood, Bournemouth, Christchurch, the New Forest, and surrounding areas across Hampshire and Dorset. We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

**Phone:** 07387 777202
**Location:** Ringwood, Hampshire, BH24, United Kingdom
**Coverage:** Ringwood, Bournemouth, Christchurch, New Forest, Hampshire, Dorset

## Services

- Local taxi journeys — Ringwood, New Forest, Bournemouth and surrounding areas
- Fixed-price airport transfers to Bournemouth Airport (BOH), Southampton Airport (SOU), Heathrow Airport (LHR), and Gatwick Airport (LGW)
- Wheelchair accessible taxis (WAV) — hydraulic ramps, secure wheelchair fastening, trained drivers
- Disabled and mobility transport — carers travel free
- Long-distance private hire

## Service Areas

Ringwood, Bournemouth, Christchurch, Ferndown, Verwood, Wimborne, Fordingbridge, New Milton, Lymington, Lyndhurst, Brockenhurst, Burley, Highcliffe, Three Legged Cross, West Moors, Poole, Totton, and the wider New Forest and Dorset areas.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you operate 24/7?**
Yes. Ringo's Taxis is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including bank holidays.

**Do you have wheelchair accessible vehicles?**
Yes. We operate fully adapted WAV (Wheelchair Accessible Vehicles) with hydraulic ramps and secure wheelchair fastening points. Carers travel free.

**Do you offer fixed prices for airport transfers?**
Yes. All airport transfers are fixed price — no meter, no surprises. We also track your flight so we adjust if there are delays.

**Which airports do you cover?**
Bournemouth Airport (BOH), Southampton Airport (SOU), Heathrow Airport (LHR), and Gatwick Airport (LGW).

**How do I book?**
Call us on 07387 777202 or use the request-a-call form at https://ringotaxis.com/request-a-call

## Contact

- **Telephone:** +44 7387 777202
- **Website:** https://ringotaxis.com
- **Address:** Ringwood, Hampshire, BH24, United Kingdom
